---
format:
  html:
    axe:
      standard: wcag2a
---

## Standard scoping

This document violates one rule per scope: `image-alt` (WCAG 2.0 A),
`color-contrast` (WCAG 2.0 AA), and `heading-order` (axe best practice).
With `standard: wcag2a` and no `output`, results default to the browser
console and only `image-alt` should be reported.

This text violates contrast rules: [insufficient contrast.]{style="color: #eee; background: #fff;"}.

<img src="placeholder.png" class="axe-test-img">

#### Skipped heading level

Jumping from h2 to h4 violates axe's best-practice `heading-order` rule.
